name: CFmon.pctisccpSouth30
title: ISCCP Mean Cloud Top Pressure
description: time-means weighted by the ISCCP Total Cloud Fraction - see <https://www.cfmip.org/tools-and-data/cosp>
processing note: This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of CFmon.pctisccpSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
